unavailable_msg:
The door is locked...
You should probably leave before the mansion's security system goes off.
first_dialog: Correct, I am indeed the founder and owner of McMoneyPants Corporation! So how may I help you?
Ah, I see you saw my work contract to mow my lawn! I do in fact need someone to assist with lawn care, I'm a busy man after all. Firstly though, we need to work out the terms of employment.

Very good, I have already had my lawyers prepare a work contract for you. I'll summarize it for you: for each lawn you mow I'll provide a $150 payment and if you are fast enough, I might also provide a bonus.
However, should you damage my property (such as flowers and hedges) I do reserve the right to take damage costs out of your wage.

You will also legally be an employee of McMoneyPants corporation. As such, McMoneyPants corporation will make a 5% contribution to your retirement pension while you are employed. You are entitled to 2 sick days this year as well.
We also reserve the right to use cameras and drones to monitor your productivity and to terminate your employment at any time for any reason.
player_dialog: I'm here to mow your lawn!
first_job_offer: Now, just sign down here and we have a deal! Chop, chop, get to work!
